domain: Wankel rotary engine — triangular rotor in epitrochoidal housing forms 3 continuously rotating working chambers, each cycling through Otto 4-stroke phases.
specific_mechanism: Single rotor with 3 faces creates 3 chambers; each face simultaneously in different phase (intake/compression/expansion/exhaust); continuous power.
llm_application: WANKEL-INFER: 3-chamber attention pipeline. Partition inference into 3 phases (new-token intake, KV-cache update, attention compute, residual emit) running in parallel chambers; chambers rotate through sequence positions. Pipeline-parallelized at chamber granularity.
novelty_claim: Continuous batching (vLLM, HF) does prefill+decode pipelining. Pipeline parallelism partitions layers. WANKEL-INFER adds phase-aware chambering — close to continuous batching with phase chunking.
